estimators.name: Pritesh Shah
estimators.title: Chief Estimator, Con-Pro Industries Canada Ltd.
personalization_hooks: Chief Estimator at Con-Pro since 2012 (~14 years tenure) — deep institutional knowledge, has seen many subs come and go. Reliability and reputation matter to him.
Title literally calls out 'chief estimator' on his LinkedIn URL slug — he's identity-invested in the role; treat him as the buyer, not a gatekeeper
15+ years estimating experience, diversified projects across Canada
Con-Pro has been around since 1969 — institutional Manitoba builder. Pitch Ashrah as a long-term partner, not a one-job sub.
Lead with the 6-day delay forecast — it's exactly the kind of risk-mitigation tool a Chief Estimator at an old-line firm doesn't have but would value

sources.claim: Chief Estimator at Con-Pro, email pattern @conpro.mb.ca

fallback_contact.name: Donald Snodgrass
fallback_contact.title: President, Con-Pro Industries Canada Ltd.
fallback_contact.rationale: President — 50+ years experience, focused on mentorship. If Pritesh isn't responsive, escalating to Don is reasonable. VP Christine Snodgrass (ex-estimator/PM) is also a viable contact and his daughter or wife — family business signal.

needs_review_flags: Email domain on Con-Pro is conpro.mb.ca (NOT conprocanada.ca despite the website URL) — verify before sending
